== Notes for [[Item:Q56513|Q56513]] ==

"'''México, Distrito Federal, registros parroquiales y diocesanos, 1514-1970'''", database with images, FamilySearch (https://familysearch.org/ark:/61903/1:1:QJ8B-MSHN : 28 July 2015), Lope de Sosa in entry for Ana Estrada de Sosa Cabrera, 1586. ... Name: '''Ana Estrada de Sosa Cabrera'''; Event Type: '''Baptism'''; Event Date: '''04 Oct 1586'''; Event Place: '''Asunción Sagrario Metropolitano, Centro, Distrito Federal, Mexico'''; Gender: Female; Father's Name: Lope de Sosa; Mother's Name: Ynes Cabrera

See a '''photograph of Ana's original Baptism Record''' in her profile's "Media/Documents" section.

REFERENCE_NUMBERS:
67051ADA8F05B1EFBBFA9822EF79916C6812
geni:6000000012546372647

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
